title: Proclamation No. 374, s. 1939
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 374

RESERVING FOR AIRPLANE LANDING PURPOSES EIGHT PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF BUTUAN, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, ISLAND OF MINDANAO.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for airplane landing purposes, under the administration of the Director of the Bureau of Aeronautics, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Butuan, Province of Agusan, Island of Mindanao, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, to wit:

Lot No. 294. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 79° 31′ W. 309.11 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence S. 4° 23′ W. 568.88 m. to point 2; N. 85° 01′ W. 35.00 m. to point 3; N. 4° 23′ E. 568.89 m. to point 4; S. 85° 01′ E. 35.00 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 19,911 square meters.

Point 2, old monument; and the rest are old B. L. con­crete monuments.

Bounded on the north by provincial road; on the east, by lot No. 562; on the south, by lot No. 300; and on the west, by lots Nos. 414-B and 448-A.

Lot No. 300. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 24° 25′ W. 1,158.27 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence N. 12° 32′ E., 444J.86 m. to point 2; S. 85° 01′ E. 35.00 m. to point 3; S. 9° 52′ W. 272.71 m. to point 4; S. 15° 06′ W. 224.41 m. to point 5; N. 25° 50′ W. 60.12 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 19,721 square meters.

Points 1 and 5, B. L. concrete monuments; point 3, old monument; and the rest are old B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by lot No. 294; on the southeast, by lots Nos. 301-A and 302-A; on the southwest, by lot No. 373; and on the. northwest, by lots Nos. 414-A and 293-A.

Lot No. 452-A. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 52° 43′ W. 446.69 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence N. 86° 58′ W. 99.84 m. to point 2; N. 4° 03′ E. 25.49 m. to point 3; S. 72° 35′ E. 102.61 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 1,272 square meters.

Point 1, old stake; points 2 and 3, B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by lot No. 448-4; on the south, by lot No. 414-B; and on the west, by lot No. 452-B of plan Bsd-4815.

Lot No. 527. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 47° 43′ W. 332.02 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence S. 4° 47′ W., 133.36 m. to point 2; S. 3° 57′ W. 6.69 m. to point 3; S. 3° 42′ W. 64.82 m. to point 4; S. 3° 41′ W. 7.00 m. to point 5; S. 33° 54′ W. 70.89 m. to point 6; S. 5° 09′ W. 75.14 m. to point 7; S. 2° 51′ W. 57.84 m. to point 8; S. 2° 51′ W. 0.13 m. to point 9; N. 85° 37′ W. 34.33 m. to point 10; N. 4° 23′ E. 0.13 m. to point 11; N. 4° 23′ E. 396.39 m. to point 12; N. 86° 00′ E. 69.47 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 21,721 square meters.

Points 9 and 10, old stakes; and the rest are old B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by lot No. 572; on the east, by lot No. 243; Calle El Filibusterismo, lot No. 241, road, and lots Nos. 240-A, 239-A, and 238-A; on the south, by lot No. 301-A; and on the west, by lot No. 562.

Lot No. 559. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 76° 28′ W. 311.67 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence S. 1° 23′ E. 46.19 m. to point 2; N. 81° 28′ W. 4.65 m. to point 3; N. 4° 23′ E. 45.62 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 106 square meters.

All corners are old B. L. concrete. monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by lot ,No. 249-A; on the south, by lot No. 571; and on the west, by lot No. 562.

Lot No. 562. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 76° 28′ W. 311.67 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence S. 4° 23′ W. 45.62 m. to point 2; S. 4° 23′ W. 10.51 m. to point 3; S. 4° 23′ W. 92.64 m. to point 4; S. 4° 23′ W. 7.00 m. to point 5; S. 4° 23′ W. 396.39 m. to point 6; S. 4° 23′ W. 0.13 m. to point 7; N. 85° 37′ W. 2.18 m. to point 8; N. 4° 23′ E. 568.88 m. to point 9; S. 84° 56′ E. 2.15 m. to point 10; S. 4° 23′ W. 16.58 m. to point 1; point of beginning.

Containing an area of 1,244 square meters,

Point 7, old stake; point 8, old monument; and the rest are old B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by Calle Zamora; on the east, by lots Nos. 249-A, 559, 246-A, and 572; on the south, by lot No. 301-A; and on the west, by lot No. 294.

Lot No. 571. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 68° 52′ W. 328.61 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence S. 81° 28′ E. 4.65 m. to point 2; S. 85° 56′ E. 59.72 m. to point 3; S. 1° 54′ W. 10.07 m. to point 4; N. 86° 00′ W. 64.82 m. to point 5; N. 4° 23′ E. 10.51 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 654 square meters.

Points 3 and 4, B. L. concrete monuments; and the rest are old B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by lots Nos. 559 and 249-A; on the east, by Calle M. H. del Pilar; on the south, by lot No. 246-A; and on the west, by lot No. 562.

Lot No. 572 —Beginning at a point marked 1 an Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181, S. 54° 52′ W. 384.43 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Butuan, thence N. 85° 56′ E., 69.16 m. to point 2; S. 1° 54′ W. 7.03 m. to point 3; S. 86° 00′ W. 69.47 m. to point 4; N. 4° 23′ E., 7.00 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 483 square meters.

Point 2, B. L. concrete monument; and the rest are old B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north by lot No. 246-A; on the east, by Calle Gomez; on the south, by lot No. 527; and on the west, by lot No. 562.

Bearings true. Declination, 1° 40′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-14181.

Surveyed: July 17 and 18, 1935. Approved: November 18, 1935.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-seventh day of January, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-nine, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fourth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source : Legislative Library, House of Representatives
